{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321174947FA020C00C81BC71D7D7F"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614534754981430040","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我感觉我是二刷了已经，就是我好像听过这个剧情，就是那一句那个我忘了，反正我就很耳熟，我一定是听过，不知道为什么又重刷了一遍，我换了一个手机，应该是因为他没有带过来这个功能，所以我们定二刷了，人的喜欢总是一成不变的二说，这明我从从始这种喜欢的都是这个哦吼吼吼吼吼吼吼吼吼吼吼吼"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772898998,"group_id":"7602230960515468313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"礼尚往来，往而不来，便以德服人；来而不往，那便以“理”服人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0GgwukakIy35ra2CfFlXls=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/34dad5eacaf047cd891ed99edc6457d6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621971&x-signature=NO%2FQIT%2FCasEuH%2B19%2FDZGTbnRb3g%3D","user_id":"70336177905","user_name":"隐烁浣霄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"70336177905","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7602230960515468313","book_info":{"abstract":"云知予一觉醒来，居然穿成了睡前通宵看的仙侠文里的同名恶毒女配？
原主是宗门长老唯一的女儿，家世优渥修为不俗，偏生对师弟情根深种，为了抢男主，对原书女主百般刁难、屡下阴招，最后落得个修为尽废、被逐出师门，惨死在妖兽林的下场。
很俗套，对吧？
原本云知予对这种仙侠文敬而远之，可好死不死的，瞥了一眼恶毒女配的名字。
跟自己一模一样啊！
又想到网友说的，书里出现有同名的人物，切记全文背诵！
云知予一边在心里吐槽以讹传讹，一边又很诚实的点进去熬大夜看。
结果……
穿来的云知予看着镜中娇美却尽是泪痕的脸，头皮发麻！
抢男主？争气运？不存在的！
那尊清冷禁欲、实力通天的师弟是女主小师妹的！
这对天造地设的璧人，她躲还来不及！
从此，恶毒女配画风突变。
师弟出现在人群之中，她闪得比谁都快，绝不凑上去刷存在感；原女主遇险，她绕路走，绝不傻乎乎上去送人头，也不给扣黑帽的机会！宗门比试，她佛系划水，只求保命不求出彩。
一心苟命，远离男女主，搞钱搞修为，只想在这危机四伏的仙侠世界安稳度日。
原男女主是摆脱了，可这个同为‘恶毒’派系的大师兄……画风好像不太对啊？
恶毒男配大师兄：恶毒女配跟恶毒男配，天生一对！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2d82f62a63e40134ee01940b20362f78~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乌鱼圭圭子","author_id":"","book_id":"7602230960515468313","book_name":"穿成仙侠文恶毒女配？我先苟命！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d0d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8194人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":248,"name":"玄幻言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=248&name=玄幻言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1459,"name":"攻略反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1459&name=攻略反派&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602520377553584702","read_count":"8194","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"167107"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"77","tags":"玄幻言情,异世穿越,攻略反派,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2d82f62a63e40134ee01940b20362f78~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779270587&x-signature=izGhgK7eGORrMGGN6V6Xavf0uSo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3756409805867727","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321174947FA020C00C81BC71D7D7F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5474,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9120,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":959},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra"
